payload.name: Command
payload.description: A bash command executed in Claude Code with metadata (description, cwd, stdout, stderr, timestamp, session_id). The core entity that users search and browse.

payload.name: Session
payload.description: A Claude Code conversation session containing multiple tool uses and commands. Sessions are stored as JSONL files in ~/.claude/projects/.

payload.name: Index
payload.description: The SQLite database storing indexed commands and messages. Uses LIKE queries with frecency ranking for search. Located at ~/.cc-dejavu/history.db.

payload.name: Message
payload.description: A conversation message from Claude Code sessions including text content, thinking blocks, tool_use and tool_result. Stored in messages table with content_type, uuid, and session_id.

payload.name: Candidate
payload.description: A high-value message identified for knowledge ingestion. Contains value_score based on content length, type weighting, and keyword patterns. Output via deja ingest for SessionEnd Hook integration.

payload.name: SearchCommands
payload.description: Search command history using substring or regex patterns. Returns ranked results with match highlighting.

payload.name: ListCommands
payload.description: List recent commands ordered by frecency or timestamp. Supports directory filtering.

payload.name: SyncHistory
payload.description: Scan Claude Code session files and extract bash commands and messages into the index. Supports incremental and force modes.

payload.name: OnboardUser
payload.description: Add deja documentation to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md so Claude knows how to use command history search.

payload.name: ParseSessionFiles
payload.description: Parse JSONL session files, extract tool_use/tool_result pairs for commands, and text/thinking blocks for messages.

payload.name: FormatOutput
payload.description: Format command results for terminal display with status indicators, timestamps, descriptions, and match highlighting.

payload.name: SearchMessages
payload.description: Search conversation content including text and thinking blocks. Supports filtering by content_type, cwd, and session_id.

payload.name: ChatSession
payload.description: View full session timeline combining messages and commands in chronological order.

payload.name: IngestCandidates
payload.description: Generate high-value candidates for knowledge ingestion. Outputs JSON for SessionEnd Hook integration with external knowledge systems.

payload.name: FrecencyRanking
payload.description: Combines frequency (log10 scaling) with recency (time-decay weights: 4h=100, 24h=70, 7d=50, 30d=30, older=10) for intelligent result ranking.

payload.name: IncrementalSync
payload.description: Tracks file byte offsets in indexed_files table to resume syncing from where we left off, avoiding re-processing.

payload.name: ValueScoring
payload.description: Calculate content value score (0-100) based on length, content type weighting (thinking +20), and keyword patterns (solve/fix/implement/design). Used to filter candidates for knowledge ingestion.

payload.name: SessionEndHookIntegration
payload.description: SessionEnd Hook calls deja ingest --candidates to provide high-value content for external knowledge systems. Candidates are filtered by min-score threshold and output as JSON.

payload.what: Use Bun runtime instead of Node.js
payload.why: Native TypeScript execution, built-in SQLite bindings, fast compilation to standalone binaries for distribution.
Combines frequency and recency to surface both commonly-used and recently-used commands. Borrowed from browser URL bars.

payload.what: Track byte offsets for incremental sync
payload.why: Session files can be large. By tracking last byte offset, we only parse new content on subsequent syncs.
Privacy-first design. Never modifies Claude session files. No cloud sync. All data stays on user machine.
Ensures results are always up-to-date without requiring manual sync. Can be disabled with --no-sync flag.

payload.what: Use SQLite with LIKE search instead of FTS5
payload.why: FTS5 requires native compilation which fails in npm installs. LIKE + frecency provides equivalent UX for command history sizes (<100k). Simpler, more portable, no module errors.

payload.what: Index messages table for conversation content
payload.why: Enables search of text/thinking blocks alongside commands. Provides complete context retrieval for session timelines.

payload.what: Integrate with SessionEnd Hook for candidate extraction
payload.why: Provides programmatic candidate filtering for external knowledge systems. Value scoring algorithm surfaces high-quality thinking and decision content.

payload.what: Auto-rebuild messages index on first upgrade
payload.why: Existing users with commands index need messages populated. Check messages table existence and trigger force sync automatically.
